title: Re-examining Psychological and Psychophysiological Effects of Respite–Active Music in HIIT
author: Karageorghis, Costas I.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is a preregistered scientific protocol relating to a study titled "Re-examining Psychological and Psychophysiological Effects of Respite–Active Music in HIIT". The preregistration was updated on 17 June 2026 to add four names to the team of researchers and to update institutional affiliations.
steps_raw: This is a preregistered scientific protocol relating to a study titled "Re-examining Psychological and Psychophysiological Effects of Respite–Active Music in HIIT". The preregistration was updated on 17 June 2026 to add four names to the team of researchers and to update institutional affiliations.
